column1: List of Topics Covered in Land use-Transportation Courses
A.  Introduction to LU and T issues
I.     Effect of Network on Travel and Land Use (Induced Demand)
N. Regulation of Land Use / Growth Management
O. Transportation Planning Process (State and Local) Infrastructure Planning, Budgeting, and Finance
R.  Accessibility and Jobs Housing Balance, Spatial Mismatch
X.  Site Design: Transit Oriented Development, Neo-traditional Development
Y.  Network Design: Traffic calming/context sensitive design, Access management
Z.   City Design: New Town Planning
